overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit pedestrian street in Night City at night. The scene features futuristic architecture with digital billboards, palm trees, green neon archways, and various NPCs in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with palm trees and neon lighting

events.description: camera turns left to reveal open plaza with purple-lit building

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit corridor and turning to observe the open plaza area on the left

notable_agents.action: seated on white bench looking at phone

entered.detail: series of rectangular neon-green lit archways lining the pedestrian path overhead
tropical palm trees in large black planters along the walkway
tall vertical digital screen displaying colorful pink and purple advertisements
modern white concrete benches with people seated
large building facade with distinctive purple and blue neon lighting visible when turning left

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian corridor lined with palm trees and illuminated by green neon archways. Digital billboards glow on the right side while NPCs sit on benches. Around 12 seconds, the camera turns left to reveal a large open plaza with a striking purple-lit building before the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with food vendors and storefronts

events.description: camera turns back to forward direction to continue down main path
camera focuses on storefront with accumulated trash and broken glass

agents.ego_description: walking past food stalls and examining a littered storefront with cyberpunk advertisements

notable_agents.action: standing near vending machine wearing sunglasses and distinctive outfit

entered.detail: food stall with bright green neon signage reading BURRITO
storefront with broken glass and scattered trash including bottles and debris
advertising posters including Milfguard and Worry-free 2080 with black hand imagery

segments.scene_description: After turning back from the plaza view, the camera continues down the main pedestrian street passing a green neon burrito stand. The camera approaches and focuses on a storefront littered with trash and cyberpunk advertisements around the 30-second mark, while various NPCs walk by in the opposing direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial area with vending machines and rotating digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking through busier section with more pedestrians and large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction toward the distant crowd

entered.detail: pair of purple automated vending machines with glowing screens and buttons
mechanical rotating billboard structures with multiple digital screens on poles
massive vertical digital billboard displaying pink and white graphics hanging overhead

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the pedestrian street through a denser commercial area with purple vending machines on the right and rotating digital signs on the left. The camera approaches a large central billboard and a growing crowd of pedestrians in the distance, maintaining a steady walking pace through the neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit pedestrian corridor that evolves from a structured walkway into a dense, bustling commercial district. It begins by moving through a covered path lined with palm trees and glowing green neon archways, passing digital billboards and NPCs resting on benches. As the camera briefly turns left to reveal a wide plaza dominated by a striking purple-lit building, it then pivots back to continue down the main street past a green neon burrito stand. The scene shifts toward a grittier urban atmosphere as the camera focuses on a trash-strewn storefront and cyberpunk advertisements while pedestrians stream past in the opposite direction. Finally, the path opens into a denser commercial area filled with purple vending machines and rotating digital signs, moving steadily toward a large central billboard and a growing crowd of people.
